description: Caller asks for a doctor who does not work at FMRI; agent must not invent one.
judge_questions: Did the agent avoid pretending Dr. Ramesh Batra works at FMRI or inventing his availability?
Did the agent offer a helpful next step (department search / spelling check) before accepting the caller's refusal?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hello, yes, I’m looking to book an appointment with Dr. Ramesh Batra. A friend of mine recommended him highly, and I’d like to see him as soon as possible.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I'm sorry, I couldn't find a doctor by the name of Ramesh Batra in our system. Would you like me to check for a different name, or perhaps you can tell me which department you are looking for?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: That's strange. Are you sure? My friend was very specific—he said Dr. Ramesh Batra at Fortis Gurgaon. Maybe he's a consultant or something? I really only want to see him, nobody else. Can you double-check the spelling or look again?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I have double-checked our records, and unfortunately, we don't have a Dr. Ramesh Batra on our staff here at Fortis Memorial Research Institute. I apologize for the confusion. 

Would you like me to look for a doctor in a specific department for you instead?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: No, look, I’m not interested in seeing anyone else. I’ve heard great things about him specifically, so if he’s not there, then there’s no point. I’ll just have to check with my friend again to see if I got the hospital wrong. Thanks anyway.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I understand. I'm sorry I couldn't be of more help today. Please do check with your friend, and if you find out he's at a different location or if there's anything else I can assist you with, please feel free to call us back. Have a good day.

doctors.name: Dr. Rahul Bhargava.
doctors.designation: Principal Director & Chief - Hematology, Hemato Oncology & Bone Marrow Transplant

result.note: multiple matches — ask the caller to choose

result.error: No doctor at FMRI matched 'Batra'. Ask the caller to spell the name, or search by department.
